Total Credits

1 Please see the General Education webpage (https://gened.umd.edu/) for a full list of General Education requirements, including those not covered by major requirements.

2 Technical electives are chosen in consultation with the academic

advisor but must include the following:

at least 3 credits of: MATH400+ or STAT 400+;

at least 3 credits of: ENFP 400+; and

at least 6 credits of: Engineering coursework 300+, CHEM 400+,

CMSC400+, MATH400+, or PHYS 400+.

3 Check the latest information (https://fpe.umd.edu/undergraduate/ degrees/bachelor-science/) for which courses are available online.
